name: @cssxjs/loaders
description: Webpack-compatible loaders for CSSX styles in React Native and Web bundlers

scripts.test: node -e "const loader = require('./cssToReactNativeLoader.js'); const output = loader.call({ query: {}, resourcePath: 'smoke.css' }, '.root { color: red }'); if (!output.includes('module.exports')) throw new Error('cssToReactNativeLoader source fallback smoke failed')"
